title.description: Oshityo shOmadhano shokumwenyo mOmusheno. Eapp yo ndjoka yomadhano gOmadhano gOmadhano gOshilongo.

subtitle.description: Oshityo shOhambo shokumwenyo po oshowo shOmadhano shilongo.

heroTitle.description: Oshityo shOmadhano shOshoka mOmusheno gOhome page.

heroSubtitle.text: Loka omadhano goholoka gOshikuku shOmadhano gOmadhano
heroSubtitle.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshoka mOmusheno gOhome page po oshowo shOmadhano.

cookingTime.description: Oshityo shOhambo shokupika mEpi gOmadhano gOshilongo. {minutes} oya shoka okwa li mEpi.

difficulty.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo po oshowo oshilongo shOmadhano gOshilongo.

easy.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshilongo sho ndjoka yOmuya.

medium.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshilongo sho ndjoka yOmbi.

hard.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshilongo sho ndjoka yOkutumba.

ramenDescription.text: Omukalo gwOmadhano gOmapuku gOshilongo gOshilongo na chashu yomahumbata, ombinga yOmapeto, na ongele yOmadhano gOmwene.

margheritaName.description: Oshindjila shOmakwawo shO Pizza ya Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan e ta li na San Marzano tomatoes, mozzarella yOmwene, na basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Okutaholoka kOmakwawo gO Pizza ya Margherita.

tacosName.description: Oshindjila shOmakwawo shO Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos dzOmapuku dzOshilongo dzO shoka na pineapple, cilantro, na onion pa corn tortillas.
tacosDescription.description: Okutaholoka kOmakwawo gO Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenDescription.text: Omadhano gOmapuku gOshilongo gOli na sauce ya tomato na butter gOli na omakandjo gO makandjo.

padThaiDescription.text: Ongele yOmadhano gOshilongo gOli na shrimp, tofu, peanuts, na sauce ya tamarind.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes dzOshilongo, dzOli na Nutella, strawberries yOmwene, na whipped cream.

label.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshindonga shOshoka mOmusheno gOheader.
